race.comment: FIFTH FORCE (2) just missed a place here over 1400m in stronger and the claim helps offset some of the weight increase. Suited at this level and will go close with average luck in the run. AMBASSADORS (5) has also been racing in better grade and drops back from a mile. He also puts in and from a handy gate will get his chance. OUT OF ACES (9) needed the first up outying here in tougher. Proven second-up and the 3kg claim brings him right into it. PULVERISER (4) posted a strong number winning here this grade over 1200m first up. The former Victorian will be fitter and has to be considered in an open race.
